controls.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant Event Grid data-plane roles to managed identities.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must use managed identity
controls.description: Event Grid domains must use managed identity when authenticating to supported event delivery destinations.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block on the Event Grid domain.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must require TLS 1.2
controls.description: Event Grid domains must reject TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 requests.
controls.remediation: Set the Event Grid domain minimumTlsVersionAllowed ARM property to "1.2". The current AzureRM eventgrid_domain resource does not expose this property, so manage it with AzAPI or an ARM deployment until provider support is available.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must disable public network access
controls.description: Event Grid domains must use private connectivity instead of public endpoints.
controls.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces must disable local authentication
controls.description: Event Hubs clients must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of shared access keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_authentication_enabled = false and grant Event Hubs data-plane roles to managed identities.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces must disable public network access
controls.description: Event Hubs namespaces must use private connectivity instead of public endpoints.
controls.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces must require TLS 1.2
controls.description: Event Hubs namespaces must reject legacy TLS protocol versions.
controls.remediation: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces should enable auto-inflate
controls.description: Standard Event Hubs namespaces should automatically increase throughput capacity during demand spikes.
controls.remediation: Set auto_inflate_enabled = true and configure maximum_throughput_units for the expected peak load.

controls.title: Premium Event Hubs namespaces should use customer-managed keys
controls.description: Premium Event Hubs namespaces should use customer-managed keys to control encryption key lifecycle and access.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_eventhub_namespace_customer_managed_key resource linked through eventhub_namespace_id and grant its managed identity access to the Key Vault key.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces should send diagnostic logs to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized Event Hubs logs support security monitoring, operational analysis, and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Event Hubs namespace and send the required logs and metrics to Log Analytics.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces must have tags
controls.description: Event Hubs namespaces must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the Event Hubs namespace.

controls.title: Event Hubs namespaces must use managed identity
controls.description: Event Hubs namespaces must use managed identity for secure access to customer-managed keys and dependent Azure services.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block on the Event Hubs namespace.

controls.title: Azure Firewall threat intelligence must deny malicious traffic
controls.description: Azure Firewall must deny traffic identified as malicious by threat intelligence.
controls.remediation: Set threat_intel_mode = "Deny".

controls.title: Azure Firewall should use Premium tier
controls.description: Premium tier enables TLS inspection and intrusion detection and prevention capabilities.
controls.remediation: Set sku_tier = "Premium" where advanced threat protection is required.

controls.title: Function apps must require HTTPS
controls.description: Azure Functions endpoints must restrict traffic to HTTPS.
controls.remediation: Set https_only = true.

controls.title: Function apps must disable Web Deploy basic authentication
controls.description: Azure Functions deployments must not use Web Deploy basic credentials.
controls.remediation: Set webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Function apps should disable public network access
controls.description: Production function apps should use private endpoints or an approved private ingress architecture.
controls.remediation: Configure private ingress and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Function apps must disable FTP basic authentication
controls.description: Azure Functions FTP publishing must not use basic credentials.
controls.remediation: Set ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Function apps must enable Always On
controls.description: Dedicated and Premium Function Apps must remain loaded for reliable trigger processing.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.always_on = true on a supported Functions plan.

controls.title: Function apps must disable remote debugging
controls.description: Remote debugging must be disabled for production Function Apps.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.remote_debugging_enabled = false.

controls.title: Function apps must require TLS 1.2 or 1.3
controls.description: Function Apps must reject legacy TLS protocol versions.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.minimum_tls_version to "1.2" or "1.3".

controls.title: Function apps must integrate with a virtual network
controls.description: VNet integration provides controlled outbound access from Function Apps to private dependencies.
controls.remediation: Set virtual_network_subnet_id to an App Service delegated subnet.

controls.title: Function apps must use a managed identity
controls.description: Managed identity removes credentials from Function App configuration.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block.

controls.title: Function apps should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized Function App logs support security monitoring and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Function App and send logs to Log Analytics.

controls.title: Key Vault public network access must be disabled
controls.description: Key Vault data-plane access must use approved private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure a private endpoint.

controls.title: Key Vault purge protection must be enabled
controls.description: Purge protection prevents permanent deletion during the soft-delete retention period.
controls.remediation: Set purge_protection_enabled = true.

controls.title: Key Vault must use Azure RBAC authorization
controls.description: Azure RBAC provides centralized, least-privilege authorization for Key Vault.
controls.remediation: Set rbac_authorization_enabled = true and assign least-privilege Key Vault data-plane roles.

controls.title: Key Vault requires a private endpoint
controls.description: Each Key Vault must be reachable through an approved vault private endpoint.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_private_endpoint connected to the Key Vault with subresource_names = ["vault"].

controls.title: Key Vault network ACLs must deny by default
controls.description: Key Vault firewall rules must deny traffic that does not match an explicit rule.
controls.remediation: Set network_acls.default_action = "Deny".

controls.title: Key Vault should allow trusted Azure services
controls.description: Approved trusted Microsoft services should be allowed to bypass the Key Vault firewall.
controls.remediation: Set network_acls.bypass = "AzureServices" when trusted service access is required.

controls.title: Key Vaults must have tags
controls.description: Key Vaults must include ownership and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags.

controls.title: Key Vaults should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized Key Vault audit logs support security monitoring and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Key Vault.

controls.title: Development key vault should use a lower SKU
controls.description: Development key vault should use a lower-cost SKU unless a higher tier is explicitly justified.
controls.remediation: For development environments, set sku_name = "standard".

controls.title: Key Vault keys must have an expiration date
controls.description: Cryptographic keys must expire to enforce lifecycle management and rotation.
controls.remediation: Set expiration_date and configure an automatic rotation policy.

controls.title: Key Vault keys should configure automatic rotation
controls.description: Automatic key rotation reduces exposure from long-lived cryptographic material.
controls.remediation: Configure rotation_policy.automatic with an approved rotation interval.

controls.title: AKS clusters must be private
controls.description: The Kubernetes API server must not be exposed through a public endpoint.
controls.remediation: Set private_cluster_enabled = true and configure private DNS connectivity.

controls.title: AKS clusters must disable local accounts
controls.description: AKS access must use Microsoft Entra authentication instead of static local administrator credentials.
controls.remediation: Set local_account_disabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters must enable Kubernetes RBAC
controls.description: Kubernetes role-based access control must enforce authorization.
controls.remediation: Set role_based_access_control_enabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters must enable Azure Policy
controls.description: Azure Policy for Kubernetes must enforce and audit cluster guardrails.
controls.remediation: Set azure_policy_enabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable workload identity
controls.description: Pods should access Azure resources through federated workload identity.
controls.remediation: Set oidc_issuer_enabled = true and workload_identity_enabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable the OIDC issuer
controls.description: The OIDC issuer is required for secure federated workload identities.
controls.remediation: Set oidc_issuer_enabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters must disable HTTP application routing
controls.description: The development-focused HTTP application routing add-on must not be used for production ingress.
controls.remediation: Set http_application_routing_enabled = false and deploy an approved ingress solution.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable image cleanup
controls.description: Unused images should be removed regularly to reduce vulnerable software retained on nodes.
controls.remediation: Set image_cleaner_enabled = true.

controls.title: Log Analytics workspaces must disable public ingestion
controls.description: Log ingestion must use private connectivity through Azure Monitor Private Link.
controls.remediation: Configure Azure Monitor Private Link and set internet_ingestion_enabled = false.

controls.title: Log Analytics workspaces must disable public queries
controls.description: Log queries must use private connectivity through Azure Monitor Private Link.
controls.remediation: Configure Azure Monitor Private Link and set internet_query_enabled = false.

controls.title: Log Analytics workspaces must disable local authentication
controls.description: Log Analytics access must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of shared keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_authentication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Machine Learning workspaces must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure Machine Learning workspaces must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Configure private endpoints and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Machine Learning workspaces must disable v1 legacy mode
controls.description: Legacy Azure Machine Learning v1 compatibility must remain disabled.
controls.remediation: Set v1_legacy_mode_enabled = false.

controls.title: Inbound NSG rules must not allow every source
controls.description: Inbound allow rules must not use a wildcard source address.
controls.remediation: Replace source_address_prefix = "*" with approved CIDR ranges, service tags, or application security groups.

controls.title: Inbound NSG rules must not allow every destination port
controls.description: Inbound allow rules must restrict destination ports.
controls.remediation: Replace destination_port_range = "*" with only the required ports.

controls.title: Public IP addresses must use Standard SKU
controls.description: Standard public IP addresses are secure by default and support zone-redundant scenarios.
controls.remediation: Set sku = "Standard".

controls.title: Public IP addresses must use static allocation
controls.description: Standard public IP addresses must use static allocation for predictable security configuration.
controls.remediation: Set allocation_method = "Static".

controls.title: Resource groups must have tags
controls.description: Resource groups must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the resource group.

controls.title: Service Bus namespaces must disable public network access
controls.description: Service Bus namespaces must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Use Premium SKU, configure a private endpoint, and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Service Bus namespaces must disable local authentication
controls.description: Service Bus clients must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of shared access keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant Service Bus data-plane roles.

controls.title: Service Bus namespaces must require TLS 1.2
controls.description: Service Bus must reject legacy TLS protocol versions.
controls.remediation: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

controls.title: SQL servers require a minimum TLS version
controls.description: Azure SQL servers must declare TLS 1.2 or later.
controls.remediation: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

controls.title: SQL servers must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure a private endpoint.

controls.title: SQL servers must restrict outbound network access
controls.description: Outbound network access from Azure SQL must be explicitly restricted.
controls.remediation: Set outbound_network_restriction_enabled = true.

controls.title: Storage accounts must block public blob access
controls.description: Azure Storage accounts must explicitly disable nested item public access.
controls.remediation: Set allow_nested_items_to_be_public = false.

controls.title: Storage accounts must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure Storage accounts must only be reachable through approved private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Storage accounts require a blob private endpoint
controls.description: Each Azure Storage account must have a private endpoint for the blob subresource.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_private_endpoint connected to the storage account with subresource_names = ["blob"].

controls.title: Storage accounts require a file private endpoint
controls.description: Each Azure Storage account must have a private endpoint for the file subresource.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_private_endpoint connected to the storage account with subresource_names = ["file"].

controls.title: Storage accounts require a table private endpoint
controls.description: Each Azure Storage account must have a private endpoint for the table subresource.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_private_endpoint connected to the storage account with subresource_names = ["table"].

controls.title: Storage accounts require a queue private endpoint
controls.description: Each Azure Storage account must have a private endpoint for the queue subresource.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_private_endpoint connected to the storage account with subresource_names = ["queue"].

controls.title: Storage accounts must require secure transfer
controls.description: Azure Storage accounts must reject unencrypted HTTP traffic and require HTTPS.
controls.remediation: Set https_traffic_only_enabled = true.

controls.title: Storage accounts must require TLS 1.2 or higher
controls.description: Azure Storage accounts must use TLS 1.2 as the minimum supported protocol version.
controls.remediation: Set min_tls_version = "TLS1_2".

controls.title: Storage accounts must disable Shared Key authorization
controls.description: Azure Storage requests must use Microsoft Entra authorization instead of account access keys.
controls.remediation: Set shared_access_key_enabled = false and configure the AzureRM provider to use Microsoft Entra authentication for supported data-plane operations.

controls.title: Production storage with sensitive data should use customer-managed keys
controls.description: Storage accounts tagged as production and sensitive should use a customer-managed key for additional control over key lifecycle and access.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_storage_account_customer_managed_key resource linked through storage_account_id. Use tags environment = "production" and data_classification = "sensitive" to declare applicability.

controls.title: Storage accounts should default to Microsoft Entra authorization
controls.description: Azure portal data operations should default to Microsoft Entra authorization instead of Shared Key authorization.
controls.remediation: Set default_to_oauth_authentication = true.

controls.title: Storage accounts must disable cross-tenant replication
controls.description: Object replication across Microsoft Entra tenants must be disabled unless explicitly required and approved.
controls.remediation: Set cross_tenant_replication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Storage accounts should use infrastructure encryption
controls.description: A second encryption layer should protect storage data for defense in depth.
controls.remediation: Set infrastructure_encryption_enabled = true when supported by the account type.

controls.title: Storage local users must be disabled
controls.description: SFTP and local-user authentication must remain disabled unless explicitly required.
controls.remediation: Set local_user_enabled = false.

controls.title: Storage network rules must deny by default
controls.description: Storage firewall rules must deny traffic that does not match an explicit rule.
controls.remediation: Set network_rules.default_action = "Deny".

controls.title: Storage firewall should allow trusted Azure services
controls.description: Trusted Microsoft services should be allowed to bypass storage firewall rules when required.
controls.remediation: Include "AzureServices" in network_rules.bypass.

controls.title: Storage accounts must enable blob soft delete
controls.description: Blob soft delete protects data from accidental deletion or overwrite.
controls.remediation: Configure blob_properties.delete_retention_policy with an approved retention period.

controls.title: Production storage should use geo-redundant replication
controls.description: Production storage should protect data against regional failure.
controls.remediation: Use GRS, RAGRS, GZRS, or RAGZRS where regional resilience is required.

controls.title: Storage queue logging must be enabled
controls.description: Queue read, write, and delete operations should be logged for auditing.
controls.remediation: Configure queue_properties.logging with read, write, and delete enabled.

controls.title: Storage accounts should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized storage logs support security monitoring and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create diagnostic settings for the storage account and required data services.

controls.title: Subnets must disable default outbound access
controls.description: Subnets must use an explicit outbound connectivity method instead of implicit default outbound access.
controls.remediation: Set default_outbound_access_enabled = false and provide approved explicit egress.

controls.title: Linux VMs must disable password authentication
controls.description: Linux virtual machines must use SSH keys instead of password authentication.
controls.remediation: Set disable_password_authentication = true and configure admin_ssh_key.

controls.title: Virtual machines should enable encryption at host
controls.description: Temporary disks, caches, and data flows between compute and storage should be encrypted at the host.
controls.remediation: Set encryption_at_host_enabled = true on supported VM sizes.

controls.title: Virtual machines must enable Secure Boot
controls.description: Generation 2 virtual machines must use Trusted Launch Secure Boot.
controls.remediation: Use a Trusted Launch compatible image and set secure_boot_enabled = true.

controls.title: Virtual machines must enable virtual TPM
controls.description: Generation 2 virtual machines must use a virtual Trusted Platform Module.
controls.remediation: Use a Trusted Launch compatible image and set vtpm_enabled = true.

controls.title: Windows VMs must enable automatic updates
controls.description: Windows virtual machines must receive operating-system security updates.
controls.remediation: Set automatic_updates_enabled = true and use an approved patch mode.

controls.title: Windows VMs should use platform-managed patching
controls.description: Azure platform-managed patch orchestration should maintain Windows security updates.
controls.remediation: Set patch_mode = "AutomaticByPlatform".

controls.title: Linux VMs should use platform-managed patching
controls.description: Azure platform-managed patch orchestration should maintain Linux security updates.
controls.remediation: Set patch_mode = "AutomaticByPlatform".

controls.title: Web apps must require HTTPS
controls.description: App Service applications must redirect and restrict traffic to HTTPS.
controls.remediation: Set https_only = true.

controls.title: Web apps must disable FTP basic authentication
controls.description: App Service FTP publishing must not use basic credentials.
controls.remediation: Set ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Web apps must disable Web Deploy basic authentication
controls.description: App Service Web Deploy publishing must not use basic credentials.
controls.remediation: Set webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_enabled = false.

controls.title: Web apps should disable public network access
controls.description: Production web apps should use private endpoints or an approved private ingress architecture.
controls.remediation: Configure private ingress and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Web apps must enable Always On
controls.description: Production web apps must remain loaded to support reliable request and background processing.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.always_on = true on a supported App Service plan.

controls.title: Web apps must disable remote debugging
controls.description: Remote debugging opens additional attack paths and must be disabled in production.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.remote_debugging_enabled = false.

controls.title: Web apps must require TLS 1.2 or 1.3
controls.description: App Service must reject legacy TLS protocol versions.
controls.remediation: Set site_config.minimum_tls_version to "1.2" or "1.3".

controls.title: Web apps must integrate with a virtual network
controls.description: Regional VNet integration provides controlled outbound access to private resources.
controls.remediation: Set virtual_network_subnet_id to an App Service delegated subnet.

controls.title: Web apps must use a managed identity
controls.description: Managed identity removes application credentials and supports Microsoft Entra authentication to dependencies.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block.

controls.title: Web apps should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized App Service diagnostic logs support security monitoring and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the web app and send logs to Log Analytics.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must inspect request bodies
controls.description: Request body inspection enables WAF managed rules to detect attacks in request payloads.
controls.remediation: Set policy_settings.request_body_check = true.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must limit request body size
controls.description: A defined request body limit reduces exposure to oversized request payloads.
controls.remediation: Set policy_settings.max_request_body_size_in_kb = 128 or update this organizational standard to the approved workload-specific value.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must use prevention mode
controls.description: Prevention mode blocks requests that match managed or custom WAF rules.
controls.remediation: Set policy_settings.enabled = true and policy_settings.mode = "Prevention".

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must have tags
controls.description: WAF policies must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the WAF policy.

assurances.title: Storage account data is encrypted at rest
assurances.description: Azure Storage service encryption protects all data at rest and cannot be disabled. Microsoft-managed keys are used unless customer-managed keys are configured.
